displayTitle: Poe Dameron #11: The Gathering Storm, Part IV
synopsis: Things are heating up for Poe Dameron and super-spymaster C-3PO! The First Order is on their tail…and Terex's evil cronies as well. Not to mention… Who's feeding information to the First Order in the first place?
title: Poe Dameron #11: The Gathering Storm, Part IV
